title: IC 1-1-1-3 - Procedural statutes
text:
IC 1-1-1-3
Procedural statutes
Sec. 3. Procedural Statutes. Notwithstanding the inclusion in the Indiana Code of
provisions relating to process, practice, procedure, or appeals that have been superseded by
rules of court, those provisions have only such force as they had before the enactment of the
Indiana Code.
